summary: T-S2-ARC-CONDITION-REGRESS-V2: ALL 6 CHK PASS. Arc conditions evaluate correctly after get_save_data() implementation. Full E2E scene flow PASS. 2 HIGH issues: parchment_pre_run.gd raw change_scene_to_file + dead HubScreen/Run3D parallel path.

checks.desc: merlin_game_controller.gd calls store.get_save_data() with null guard
checks.evidence: merlin_game_controller.gd:284-286: var save_data: Dictionary = {}; if store and store.has_method('get_save_data'): save_data = store.get_save_data(). Null guard present.
